name: @better-seo/core
description: Framework-agnostic SEO core for JavaScript and TypeScript: build a canonical SEO document with createSEO and mergeSEO, emit HTML-safe JSON-LD via serializeJSONLD, validate in development, render plain meta tag descriptors, and plug in frameworks through a small adapter registry. Ships with zero runtime npm dependencies so Node, Edge, and browser bundles avoid heavy transitive deps. Use with @better-seo/next or your own adapter; optional OG and icons stay in @better-seo/assets.
